summary: 0.6.39 wires the attached demo3 sliders and text displays to live player state so scene testing stops feeling blind.
operatorSignals: It was hard to tell what the player was really doing because the scene sliders and text fields were not reflecting state.
Fresh builder defaults helped scrub startup, but scene-state visibility was still missing.
actionsTaken: Added a cached attached-screen demo3 runtime sync seam for progress, volume, current text, total text, and shuffle label.
Kept the update on the existing refresh cadence instead of adding a new hot loop.
nonGoals: No folder or filename text displays yet.
